# Data Source: okta_auth_servers

Get a list of authorization servers from Okta.

## Example Usage

{{tffile "/Users/rmcgregor/Development/terraform-provider-okta/examples/data-sources/okta_auth_servers/data-source.tf"}}

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `q` (String) Searches the name and audiences of authorization servers for matching value.

### Read-Only

- `auth_servers` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--auth_servers))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--auth_servers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `auth_servers`

Read-Only:

- `audiences` (List of String)
- `credentials_last_rotated` (String)
- `credentials_next_rotation` (String)
- `credentials_rotation_mode` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `issuer` (String)
- `issuer_mode` (String)
- `kid` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `status` (String)
